description_long: This is a colorful athletic sneaker featuring a playful design with a cartoon planet motif on the outer side and a smiling star on the inner side. The upper is primarily constructed from a mix of gray and teal synthetic materials, with accents of light blue and brown along the toe and sole. The shoe has a padded collar and tongue for comfort, and a pull tab at the heel for easy wearing. The lacing system is a standard criss-cross style with gray laces threading through reinforced eyelets. The midsole and outsole are light blue with a white base, providing cushioning and grip. Decorative stitching and a signature-like script on the heel add unique character to the shoe.
description: A vibrant sneaker with cartoon planet and star motifs, gray and teal panels, and a light blue sole. Features include a padded collar, standard lacing, and playful decorative details.
description_view_0: Side view showing the cartoon planet motif, teal and gray panels, and signature script on the heel.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the gray laces, padded tongue, and brown accent on the toe.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the smiling star motif and teal heel panel.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the pull tab, teal heel, and signature script detail.
attribute_logo: cartoon planet on outer side, smiling star on inner side, signature script on heel
